headline: Trump's Golden Dome 💰🛡️ $1.2TN MISSILE FLOP 😱💥
text:
Trump 🍊👨‍💼 dropping BOMBS 💣😂 on his 'Golden Dome' 🏛️✨ missile shield – CBO simps 📊🤓 just ROASTED 🔥 it at $1.2TN 🤑💸 over 20 years, NEARLY 7X 🚀 his WILD $175BN guess 😩📈! That's acquisition ALONE over $1TN for interceptor layers 🛡️🔥 and space-based trackers 👽🛰️ – SpaceX 🚀🐸 and Lockheed 🛩️💰 already SNAGGING $3.2BN contracts to prototype interceptors like Elon fixing Twitter 😤🐦! But HOLD UP 🤚😱, this THICC pricetag might not even STOP a full-scale Russia 🐻🇷🇺 or China 🐉🇨🇳 missile ORGY 💦💥 – CBO warns it could get OVERWHELMED 😵‍💫 like MTG at an Epstein party 🛌🍆!

Dem Senator Jeff Merkley 🧢📢 spilling TEA ☕: 'Golden Dome's just a MASSIVE giveaway to defense contractor DADDIES 👨‍💼💰 paid by WORKING AMERICANS 😤🤑!' Trump hyped it DAYS after White House return 🏰🔥 as 'Iron Dome for 'Murica' 🛡️🇺🇸 to counter next-gen threats 🚀😈 – from land 🌍, sea 🌊, SPACE 👽 with sensors and interceptors zapping missiles from the MOON 🌕 or other side of the world 🌎💨! He lowballed at $25BN starter pack 🎒 initially, but reality CHECKMATED ♟️ him HARDER than Kamala's border wall flop 🧱😂!

Pentagon 🤫🛡️ and WH ghosted BBC 📺 like Hunter's laptop 😶💻, but experts SIMPing 🤤: US too BIG 🍑 for full coverage, existing gear OUTPACED by adversary WMDs 🧨🐉! Exec order screams threats 'MORE INTENSE' 😱🔥 – catastrophic AF 🌪️💥! Trump a week into Term 2 ordering DoD to COOK UP plans 📋🚀 against 'MOST CATASTROPHIC' aerial apocalypses ☄️. Golden Dome? More like Golden GOOSE 🪿💸 for contractors while Putin & Xi LAUGHING 😈😂 at the VULNERABLE shield that can't handle peer attacks 🥊🇷🇺🇨🇳! Wall Street WEIGHING IN 📉🤑 – is this Trump's Space Force 2.0 flop or Elon-Musk approved ROCKET FAIL 🚀💥? CBO said 'NOT TODAY' ❌😤!
